subcodes.first_line: O Jinab-i-Amin! The affairs in the Holy Land are constrained and beset with abundant hardship, for after those well-known events [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جناب امین امور ارض مقصود در ضیق و عسرت موفور زیرا بعد از وقایع معلومه
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @law of Huququ'llah
